g.title: package_logic
g.text: How a package ends up on an installed SYN-OS system

g.title: note
g.text: Categories are organisational only, the file says so
directly. pacman treats every package identically once
installed, there is no protected tier: removing something
the desktop depends on (waybar, labwc, a zsh plugin) is
on you to avoid, same as any other Arch install.
packages.x86_64 and syn-packages.zsh never share code --
two lists, two moments, kept in sync by hand only.
